From: rates@latamairlines.com
Subject: RE: 26-06-002 — Solicitud de tarifa LIM → LAX [Aéreo]

Dear Abel,

Thank you for your inquiry reference 26-06-002.
Please find below our current air freight rates for Lima (LIM) to Los Angeles (LAX).

RATE QUOTATION:

  Freight rate: USD 3.20 per kg (minimum 45 kg)
  BL fee / AWB fee: USD 30.00 flat
  Transit time: 2 days
  Validity: 7 days

Surcharges:
  - Fuel surcharge (FSC): USD 0.45 / kg
  - Security surcharge: USD 0.10 / kg

Notes:
- Rate subject to space availability at time of booking
- Chargeable weight applies (volumetric weight: length × width × height cm / 6000)
- Does not include origin/destination handling fees

Please confirm booking at least 48 hours prior to flight departure.

Best regards,
Carlos Mendoza
Revenue Management — LATAM Cargo
rates@latamairlines.com
